description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a vibrant and detailed Loki-themed design, with the front panel showcasing a large, colorful image of Loki in his iconic horned helmet, surrounded by a cosmic background. The control panel is equipped with two black joysticks and multiple yellow buttons, suggesting support for two players. The cabinet's sides are adorned with high-resolution graphics of Loki in various poses, rendered in a photorealistic style with a slightly distressed, weathered finish. The top marquee area displays the name 'Loki' with matching thematic artwork, tying the visual identity together. The cabinet is constructed from sturdy materials, likely wood or MDF, with a glossy laminate finish that enhances the vividness of the printed graphics. The overall build is typical of classic upright arcade machines, with a slanted screen and a spacious control area.
description: A Loki-themed upright arcade game cabinet with vivid character artwork, dual joysticks, and a glossy, weathered finish. The sides and front are decorated with detailed graphics and a matching marquee.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main Loki artwork, control panel with two joysticks and multiple buttons, and the themed marquee at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view featuring a large, detailed image of Loki in costume, with visible weathering and a partial view of the control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a full-body image of Loki, with a darker, more subdued color palette and no visible controls.
description_view_3: Right side view with another portrait of Loki, similar in style to the left side, and a partial glimpse of the control panel.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, slightly curved, medium size with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two black joysticks and six yellow buttons arranged in two clusters, suitable for two players side-by-side
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the word 'Loki' with matching green and orange cosmic-themed artwork, consistent with the cabinet's overall design
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display large, detailed images of Loki in costume, with a cosmic and weathered visual theme in green, yellow, and black tones
